name: Emergency After-Hours Maintenance
description: Maintenance wraps the emergency maintenance path with trust-but-verify evidence, full-state ownership checks, safe zero-cost mitigation, and human approval before resident, vendor, owner, truck-roll, or fee actions.

stages.name: Verify Emergency Intake
stages.description: Normalize the claim, require evidence, and check who already owns the work before any outbound.

steps.title: Normalize emergency claim
steps.instructions: Normalize resident, property, unit, reported issue, claimed severity, photos, videos, sensor proof, message thread, phone/email source, existing work-order refs, existing vendor assignment, human owner, and source confidence. A resident verbal claim alone is not enough for emergency spend; missing evidence must be null with needs_verification.
steps.dispatch_body: Normalize emergency claim, evidence, and missing-data flags. No resident, vendor, or owner sends.

steps.title: Check full state and current owner
steps.instructions: Read the full message thread, photos, existing assignment, vendor status, human notes, and who already owns the issue before any outbound. If a human, tech, or vendor is already actively handling it, stop and surface instead of acting.
steps.dispatch_title: Check full state and current owner
steps.dispatch_body: Check full work-order state and ownership before outbound. Stop if human/tech/vendor already owns it.

steps.title: Review emergency evidence
steps.instructions: Review whether photo, video, sensor, staff, or other evidence supports an emergency roll. Resident verbal-only claims stay needs_verification and must not trigger emergency spend.
steps.human_prompt: Review evidence before emergency truck roll, vendor fee, or owner notification.

stages.name: Safe Zero-Cost Mitigation
stages.description: Prepare safe immediate mitigation guidance that does not commit spend or outbound action.

steps.title: Draft safe mitigation guidance
steps.instructions: Draft safe, zero-cost mitigation guidance appropriate to evidence, such as shutting off a valve, turning off a breaker, moving away from a hazard, or calling 911 for immediate life safety. This is draft guidance for approval unless standing policy explicitly allows the exact safety instruction.
steps.dispatch_body: Draft zero-cost mitigation guidance. No vendor dispatch, resident send, or owner send.

steps.title: Approve mitigation send
steps.instructions: Approve, edit, or hold any resident-facing mitigation guidance before it is sent, unless a separate standing policy authorizes this exact zero-cost safety instruction.
steps.human_prompt: Approve resident-facing zero-cost mitigation guidance before send.

stages.name: Approve Emergency Dispatch
stages.description: Human approval gate before truck roll, vendor fee, owner notification, or resident/vendor contact.

steps.title: Draft emergency dispatch packet
steps.instructions: Draft dispatch packet with verified evidence, severity, safety mitigation, existing owner/assignment check, trade recommendation, vendor options, NTE/fee estimate, owner notification draft, and resident update draft. Draft-only; do not contact anyone or commit spend.
steps.dispatch_body: Draft emergency dispatch packet only. No resident/vendor/owner sends and no truck roll or vendor fee.

steps.title: Approve emergency roll
steps.instructions: Approve, hold, downgrade, or reroute before any emergency truck roll, vendor fee, vendor contact, resident update, owner notice, or dispatch system action. Evidence plus full-state ownership check must be present before approval.
steps.human_prompt: Human approval required before emergency truck roll, vendor fee, vendor contact, resident update, or owner notice.

stages.name: Stage Approved Emergency Action
stages.description: Stage approved metadata and follow-up packets without performing the external action.

steps.title: Stage approved emergency actions
steps.instructions: Stage approved vendor dispatch metadata, resident update draft, owner notification draft, evidence refs, spend cap, and follow-up checkpoints for operator release. Do not contact residents, vendors, or owners; do not dispatch; do not create fees.
steps.dispatch_body: Stage approved emergency action metadata only. No external sends, dispatch, or fee creation.

steps.title: Record emergency closeout
steps.instructions: Record evidence basis, approval source, owner/assignment check outcome, action staged, downgrade/hold reason, and next checkpoint. Do not write to PropertyMeld, AppFolio, or vendor systems.
steps.dispatch_body: Record internal emergency maintenance closeout. No system writes and no external sends.
